headline: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Shares Up Nearly 15% After Jim Cramer Thought It Was Worth Buying
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Winners to Buy: Top 20 AI & Other Stocks He Got Right in 2026. Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) is a regional bank headquartered in Ohio. Its shares are up by 31% over the past year and […]
